hooks.command: [ "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" != "main" ] && [ "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" != "master" ] || { echo '{"block": true, "message": "🚫 Cannot edit on main/master. Create a feature branch first."}' >&2; exit 2; }
case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND" in *'rm -rf /'*|*'rm -rf ~'*|*'sudo rm'*|*'chmod 777'*|*'> /dev'*) echo '{"block": true, "message": "🚫 Dangerous command blocked"}' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac

filepath="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.json|*.css|*.scss|*.md) npx prettier --write "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.py) black "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || ruff format "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.go) gofmt -w "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.rs) rustfmt "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; exit 0
filepath="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$filepath" in *.test.*|*.spec.*|*_test.*) echo '{"feedback": "🧪 Test file modified. Run tests to verify."}' ;; esac; exit 0
branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'none'); echo "{\"feedback\": \"📂 $(basename $PWD) | 🌿 $branch | Type /help for commands\"}"
